column1: Mr Smith (to fix) his car yesterday morning.
They (not to take) care of the garden next summer.
I usually (to get) up at seven o’clock in the morning.
Pat (not to cook) dinner at the moment. She (to talk) on the phone now.
You (to tell) your mother the truth about the money yesterday.
The boys (to spend) a lot of time there last month.
He just (to have) time to take a cold shower last evening.
They (to find) themselves on the shore of a large lake an hour ago.
